title: Scary Ambiance
description: A Client-Side Modpack to make your Game look and feel more scary. (+Optimization)
body:
Scary Ambiance is a Minecraft Client-Side Modpack based on [Fablously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) by robotkoer with some ressource packs, shaders and ambient sounds to scare you.

The fact the Modpack is just Client-Side makes it able to play on any public server, but I do not assure you that all mods are allowed on any server.

When you don´t just want a scary ambiance I highly recommend you to play the [Horrorgames](https://modrinth.com/modpack/horrorgames) Modpack.
